title: The Art of Slow Living in NairobiFinding peace amidst
author: Admin
content:
ng matatu horns to the distant hum of nightlife, the energy is infectious. but sometimes, you need to step back.

Calculation shows that taking a moment of silence can change your entire day.

I sat by the window today, watching the jacarandas bloom. It was a moment of pure, unadulterated presence.
